case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB VS. MICHAEL P. HUNG et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-01-2013 CONTINUED TO JUL-03-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT , CONDITIONAL, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR MAR-11-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE AUG-13-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK AS TO DEFENDANT HUNG, MICHAEL P. AN INDIVIDUAL SYNERGY PROMOTIONS, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY ADBA SYNERGY DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-01-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-28-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-16-2013
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-13-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-03-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-11-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
